calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CURTIS F. DOWLING, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF AND DAVID SPEAR, AGENT FOR PLAINTIFF ARE PRESENT. JAMES HINES, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANTS IS PRESENT, AND DEFENDANTS PAULA WEISS AND BRETT NEWELL ARE PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS HELD. MATTER IS SETTLED. PURSUANT TO JUDGE PRO TEM, PARTIES ENTERED INTO SIGNED AGREEMENT WHICH WAS NOT FILED. VACATE TRIAL DATE.

JUDGE PRO TEM PETER HADIARIS, CLERK NANCY REGAS, NOT REPORTED (218).

Ntc Of Motion For Ordser Compelling Responses To Written Discovery And A Property Inspection And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

Curtis F. Dowling for Plaintiff and moving party Davis Paul Management Group

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Davis Paul Management's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents and to permit an inspection is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection and to produce documents by October 19, 2006. In addition, defendants are ordered to permit an inspection of the premises on October 19, 2006. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $830 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
